tasks.label: Start SeedDetect emulator
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $workspace='${workspaceFolder}'; $targetSerial='emulator-5554'; function Resolve-AndroidSdkRoot { $localProps=Join-Path $workspace 'android\local.properties'; if (Test-Path $localProps -PathType Leaf) { $line=(Get-Content $localProps | Where-Object { $_ -match '^\s*sdk\.dir\s*=\s*.+$' } | Select-Object -First 1); if ($line) { $sdk=($line -replace '^\s*sdk\.dir\s*=\s*','').Trim(); $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\','\'; $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\:', ':'; if ($sdk -and (Test-Path $sdk -PathType Container)) { return (Resolve-Path $sdk).Path } } }; $candidates=@(); if ($env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT) { $candidates+=$env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT }; if ($env:ANDROID_HOME -and $env:ANDROID_HOME -ne $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT) { $candidates+=$env:ANDROID_HOME }; foreach ($p in $candidates) { if ($p -and (Test-Path $p -PathType Container)) { return (Resolve-Path $p).Path } }; return $null }; function Resolve-AdbExe([string]$sdkRoot) { if ($sdkRoot) { $p=Join-Path $sdkRoot 'platform-tools\adb.exe'; if (Test-Path $p -PathType Leaf) { return $p } }; $cmd=Get-Command adb -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { return $cmd.Source }; return $null }; function Resolve-EmulatorExe([string]$sdkRoot) { if ($sdkRoot) { $p=Join-Path $sdkRoot 'emulator\emulator.exe'; if (Test-Path $p -PathType Leaf) { return $p } }; $cmd=Get-Command emulator -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { return $cmd.Source }; return $null }; function Get-DeviceSerials([string]$adbExe) { (& $adbExe devices) | Select-Object -Skip 1 | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\s+')[0] } | Where-Object { $_ } }; $sdkRoot=Resolve-AndroidSdkRoot; $adb=Resolve-AdbExe $sdkRoot; if (-not $adb) { throw 'Android SDK not found: set ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/ANDROID_HOME or configure sdk.dir in android/local.properties, or add adb to PATH.' }; & $adb start-server | Out-Null; $serials=Get-DeviceSerials $adb; if ($serials -contains $targetSerial) { Write-Host "Emulator already running: $targetSerial"; exit 0 }; if (-not $sdkRoot) { try { $sdkRoot=(Resolve-Path (Split-Path (Split-Path $adb -Parent) -Parent)).Path } catch {} }; $emulator=Resolve-EmulatorExe $sdkRoot; if (-not $emulator) { throw 'Android emulator not found: ensure Android SDK emulator is installed and emulator is in PATH (or set ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/ANDROID_HOME).' }; $avdList=(& $emulator -list-avds | Where-Object { $_ -and $_.Trim().Length -gt 0 }); if (-not $avdList -or $avdList.Count -eq 0) { throw 'No Android Virtual Devices found. Create one first (preferred name: SeedDetect_API34).' }; $preferred='SeedDetect_API34'; $selected=if ($avdList -contains $preferred) { $preferred } else { $avdList[0] }; Write-Host "Starting emulator AVD: $selected"; Start-Process -FilePath $emulator -ArgumentList '-avd', $selected | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $deadline=(Get-Date).AddSeconds(120); do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $serials=Get-DeviceSerials $adb } while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline -and -not ($serials -contains $targetSerial)); if (-not ($serials -contains $targetSerial)) { throw 'Emulator process started but adb did not detect emulator-5554 within timeout.' }; Write-Host 'Emulator is up: emulator-5554';

tasks.label: Run SeedDetect debug (emulator)
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $workspace='${workspaceFolder}'; function Resolve-FlutterExe { $localProps=Join-Path $workspace 'android\local.properties'; if (Test-Path $localProps -PathType Leaf) { $line=(Get-Content $localProps | Where-Object { $_ -match '^\s*flutter\.sdk\s*=\s*.+$' } | Select-Object -First 1); if ($line) { $sdk=($line -replace '^\s*flutter\.sdk\s*=\s*','').Trim(); $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\','\'; $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\:', ':'; $cand=Join-Path $sdk 'bin\flutter.bat'; if (Test-Path $cand -PathType Leaf) { return $cand }; $cand2=Join-Path $sdk 'bin\flutter'; if (Test-Path $cand2 -PathType Leaf) { return $cand2 } } }; $cmd=Get-Command flutter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { return $cmd.Source }; $cmd=Get-Command flutter.bat -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { return $cmd.Source }; return $null }; function Resolve-AndroidSdkRoot { $localProps=Join-Path $workspace 'android\local.properties'; if (Test-Path $localProps -PathType Leaf) { $line=(Get-Content $localProps | Where-Object { $_ -match '^\s*sdk\.dir\s*=\s*.+$' } | Select-Object -First 1); if ($line) { $sdk=($line -replace '^\s*sdk\.dir\s*=\s*','').Trim(); $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\','\'; $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\:', ':'; if ($sdk -and (Test-Path $sdk -PathType Container)) { return (Resolve-Path $sdk).Path } } }; $candidates=@(); if ($env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT) { $candidates+=$env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT }; if ($env:ANDROID_HOME -and $env:ANDROID_HOME -ne $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT) { $candidates+=$env:ANDROID_HOME }; foreach ($p in $candidates) { if ($p -and (Test-Path $p -PathType Container)) { return (Resolve-Path $p).Path } }; $cmd=Get-Command adb -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { try { return (Resolve-Path (Split-Path (Split-Path $cmd.Source -Parent) -Parent)).Path } catch {} }; return $null }; function Resolve-JavaHome { if ($env:JAVA_HOME -and (Test-Path (Join-Path $env:JAVA_HOME 'bin\java.exe') -PathType Leaf)) { return $env:JAVA_HOME }; $localJdk='C:\SeeDDetect\toolchains\jdk17\jdk-17.0.18+8'; if (Test-Path (Join-Path $localJdk 'bin\java.exe') -PathType Leaf) { return $localJdk }; $javaCmd=Get-Command java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($javaCmd) { try { return (Resolve-Path (Join-Path (Split-Path $javaCmd.Source -Parent) '..')).Path } catch {} }; return $null }; $flutter=Resolve-FlutterExe; if (-not $flutter) { throw 'Flutter not found: add flutter to PATH or set flutter.sdk in android/local.properties.' }; $sdkRoot=Resolve-AndroidSdkRoot; if ($sdkRoot) { $env:ANDROID_HOME=$sdkRoot; $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=$sdkRoot }; $javaHome=Resolve-JavaHome; if (-not $javaHome) { throw 'JDK 17 not found. Set JAVA_HOME or install JDK 17.' }; $env:JAVA_HOME=$javaHome; $javaBin=Join-Path $javaHome 'bin'; if ($env:Path -notmatch [regex]::Escape($javaBin)) { $env:Path = $javaBin + ';' + $env:Path }; $gradleHome='C:\SeeDDetect\toolchains\gradle-home'; if (-not (Test-Path $gradleHome -PathType Container)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $gradleHome | Out-Null }; $env:GRADLE_USER_HOME=$gradleHome; & $flutter run -d emulator-5554 --debug;

tasks.label: Build SeedDetect release APK (phone)
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $workspace='${workspaceFolder}'; function Resolve-FlutterExe { $localProps=Join-Path $workspace 'android\local.properties'; if (Test-Path $localProps -PathType Leaf) { $line=(Get-Content $localProps | Where-Object { $_ -match '^\s*flutter\.sdk\s*=\s*.+$' } | Select-Object -First 1); if ($line) { $sdk=($line -replace '^\s*flutter\.sdk\s*=\s*','').Trim(); $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\','\'; $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\:', ':'; $cand=Join-Path $sdk 'bin\flutter.bat'; if (Test-Path $cand -PathType Leaf) { return $cand }; $cand2=Join-Path $sdk 'bin\flutter'; if (Test-Path $cand2 -PathType Leaf) { return $cand2 } } }; $cmd=Get-Command flutter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { return $cmd.Source }; $cmd=Get-Command flutter.bat -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { return $cmd.Source }; return $null }; function Resolve-AndroidSdkRoot { $localProps=Join-Path $workspace 'android\local.properties'; if (Test-Path $localProps -PathType Leaf) { $line=(Get-Content $localProps | Where-Object { $_ -match '^\s*sdk\.dir\s*=\s*.+$' } | Select-Object -First 1); if ($line) { $sdk=($line -replace '^\s*sdk\.dir\s*=\s*','').Trim(); $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\','\'; $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\:', ':'; if ($sdk -and (Test-Path $sdk -PathType Container)) { return (Resolve-Path $sdk).Path } } }; $candidates=@(); if ($env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT) { $candidates+=$env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT }; if ($env:ANDROID_HOME -and $env:ANDROID_HOME -ne $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT) { $candidates+=$env:ANDROID_HOME }; foreach ($p in $candidates) { if ($p -and (Test-Path $p -PathType Container)) { return (Resolve-Path $p).Path } }; $cmd=Get-Command adb -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { try { return (Resolve-Path (Split-Path (Split-Path $cmd.Source -Parent) -Parent)).Path } catch {} }; return $null }; function Resolve-JavaHome { if ($env:JAVA_HOME -and (Test-Path (Join-Path $env:JAVA_HOME 'bin\java.exe') -PathType Leaf)) { return $env:JAVA_HOME }; $localJdk='C:\SeeDDetect\toolchains\jdk17\jdk-17.0.18+8'; if (Test-Path (Join-Path $localJdk 'bin\java.exe') -PathType Leaf) { return $localJdk }; $javaCmd=Get-Command java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($javaCmd) { try { return (Resolve-Path (Join-Path (Split-Path $javaCmd.Source -Parent) '..')).Path } catch {} }; return $null }; $flutter=Resolve-FlutterExe; if (-not $flutter) { throw 'Flutter not found: add flutter to PATH or set flutter.sdk in android/local.properties.' }; $kp=Join-Path $workspace 'android\key.properties'; if (-not (Test-Path $kp -PathType Leaf)) { throw 'Release signing is not configured: missing android/key.properties.' }; $sdkRoot=Resolve-AndroidSdkRoot; if ($sdkRoot) { $env:ANDROID_HOME=$sdkRoot; $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=$sdkRoot }; $javaHome=Resolve-JavaHome; if (-not $javaHome) { throw 'JDK 17 not found. Set JAVA_HOME or install JDK 17.' }; $env:JAVA_HOME=$javaHome; $javaBin=Join-Path $javaHome 'bin'; if ($env:Path -notmatch [regex]::Escape($javaBin)) { $env:Path = $javaBin + ';' + $env:Path }; $gradleHome='C:\SeeDDetect\toolchains\gradle-home'; if (-not (Test-Path $gradleHome -PathType Container)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $gradleHome | Out-Null }; $env:GRADLE_USER_HOME=$gradleHome; & $flutter build apk --release;
